name: Project Governance
next_task: Wire estimation accuracy and governance drill-down into the Command Center overlay
current_focus: Governance data is seeded and live; next step is surfacing estimation accuracy, timing truth, and drill-downs in the Command Center
completion_checks: Governance routes mount once at /api/v1 without path duplication
Manifest schema validates all project manifests
Verifier can evaluate a single project or all manifests
Coupling and staleness scripts run in CI
Seed script can populate projects and segments from amendment build plans
Projects dashboard can read seeded governance data from DB
Governance captures estimate vs actual timing so forecast accuracy can improve over time
anti_drift_notes: Governance routes are mounted once at /api/v1. Do not mount the same router separately at /api/v1/projects and /api/v1/pending-adam or every path will double-prefix. This lane exists to keep project state truthful, not to implement feature-specific behavior.

decision_debt.description: Seed script was run and live endpoints were verified on 2026-03-27
Governance data is live in the API but Command Center still needs estimation/drill-down panels
Timing truth should become a first-class habit across all amendments so estimate accuracy improves instead of staying anecdotal
